'''Pleth Strom''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Ensign/Legends|Ensign]] [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] who served the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] and the [[Praesitlyn Defense Force]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. In [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]], he flew a [[V-19 Torrent starfighter/Legends|T-19 starfighter]] alongside [[Erk H'Arman]] when the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]] invaded [[Praesitlyn/Legends|Praesitlyn]]. During the [[Battle of Praesitlyn|battle]], Erk lost contact with Pleth, who inevitably died in the struggle.
